name: pid-component

scripts.test: lerna run test && npm run test-storybook
scripts.build-storybook: npm run build-storybook:root && npm run build-storybook:children && npm run build-storybook:copy
scripts.build-storybook:children: npm run build-storybook -w packages/react-library && npm run build-storybook -w packages/vue-library && npm run build-storybook -w packages/angular-library && npm run build-storybook -w packages/nextjs-app
scripts.build-storybook:copy: cp -r packages/react-library/storybook-static storybook-static/react-vite && cp -r packages/vue-library/storybook-static storybook-static/vue && cp -r packages/angular-library/storybook-static storybook-static/angular && cp -r packages/nextjs-app/storybook-static storybook-static/react-nextjs
scripts.storybook:children: concurrently "npm run storybook --workspace=packages/react-library" "npm run storybook --workspace=packages/vue-library" "npm run storybook --workspace=packages/angular-library" "npm run storybook --workspace=packages/nextjs-app"
scripts.storybook:composed: wait-on http://localhost:6007 http://localhost:6008 http://localhost:6009 http://localhost:6010 && storybook dev -p 6006

description: Monorepo for the PID Component and related packages
